name: Black Bean Soup with Cilantro & Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in enough water to cover. Drain.
2. Place the beans, 6 cups of water, broth mix, and pepper in a large pot.
3. Cook over low heat until the beans are tender, about 2 to 3 hours.
4. Meanwhile, cook the leeks, carrots, and onion in about 2 cups of water until tender, about 30 minutes.
5. When the beans are done, remove 2 cups of beans along with their liquid and process in a blender or food processor until smooth.
6. Return to the soup pot.
7. Add the cooked veggies and remaining water back into the blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
8. Add to the beans and mix well.
9. Stir in the cilantro and orange zest just before serving.
Variations: Cook 1 peeled and chopped potato with the beans and/or puree all of the bean mixture for a thicker soup.
